twitter_thread: Spent 6 months testing 27 AI productivity apps. Only 3 boosted my output by 20% or more.
5 AI task managers failed to impress: 2 used outdated ML models, 2 had buggy interfaces, 1 was just a rebranded Todoist.
Focus@Will's AI-generated music increased my writing speed by 12% in a 30-day trial.
Don't auto-sort emails with AI: I lost 2 hours to a mislabeled 'important' folder in Sanebox.
Combining AI project management with weekly manual reviews cut my meeting time by 25%.
Otter.ai transcribed 100 meetings with 90% accuracy, saving me 1 hour/day.
What AI-driven tool has given you the biggest productivity gain? #aiproductivity #productivityhacks
pack.linkedin: After 6 months of testing, I found that only 3 out of 27 AI productivity apps delivered significant results.
